gap_summaries: [ultrathink] 🟡 Coverage collector hardcodes P0 threshold — spec says 'risk-required' but collector uses profile.matrix.P0.coverage_pct. Story's risk priority unavailable to collectors. FIXED: documented as Global Constraint; adjudicator (M9) will override.

[ultrathink] 🟡 Trace checker only verified File List heading presence — spec requires 'File List complete'. FIXED: enhanced _check_story_file to verify non-empty content under heading; added test_empty_file_list_returns_one test case.

[ultrathink] 🟡 Checker scripts adr_check.py and trace_check.py used open(encoding='utf-8') without errors='replace' — non-UTF-8 files would crash subprocess. FIXED: added errors='replace' to all open() calls.

[ultrathink] 🟡 KNIP.file_patterns included '*.py' — knip is TypeScript/JS-only analyzer, would trigger unnecessarily on Python-only changes. FIXED: replaced '*.py' with '*.json' (knip analyzes package.json/tsconfig).

[ultrathink] 🟡 Integration test test_presence_collector_pass only checked status=='ok' — didn't verify collector, tool, category, exit_code fields. FIXED: added specific field assertions for all key evidence fields.

[ultrathink] 🟡 npx-based tools (tsc, biome, knip, vitest, playwright, docusaurus) fail collector_doctor preflight — shutil.which(config.tool) returns None when binary only accessible via npx. FIXED: documented as Global Constraint; doctor enhancement deferred.
[ultrathink] 🟡→🔵 tool='python3' may not resolve via shutil.which on Windows — build_cmd uses sys.executable (correct) but doctor reports unavailable. Non-blocking since doctor is advisory.
[ultrathink] 🟡→🔵 Coverage P0 threshold is conservative default — remaining gap after documentation fix. Full risk-priority-aware coverage deferred to adjudicator (M9).
[ultrathink] 🔵 No subprocess-level tests for coverage_check.py, adr_check.py, trace_check.py — only presence_check.py has subprocess tests verifying __main__ guard.
[ultrathink] 🔵 Missing __all__ exports in category modules (docs.py, static.py, correctness.py, process.py) — inconsistent with collector_config.py pattern.
[ultrathink] 🔵 _coverage_cmd uses str(int(threshold)) — truncates float thresholds (80.5→80). Default profiles use integers so non-blocking.
[ultrathink] 🔵 No tool_version_cmd for checker-script collectors — DOC_PRESENCE, COVERAGE, ADR, TRACE report no version in doctor output.
[ultrathink] 🔵 _CHECKS_DIR path resolution duplicated in docs.py, correctness.py, process.py — minor DRY violation, could use shared constant.
[ultrathink] 🔵 DOCUSAURUS.tool_version_cmd ('npx', 'docusaurus', '--version') may trigger npx download delay during doctor check.
[ultrathink] 🔵 Docusaurus command doesn't handle nested docs directories — npx docusaurus build assumes config at checkout root.
[ultrathink] 🔵 COVERAGE.file_patterns includes both *.py and *.ts/*.tsx — may trigger coverage collector when only one language changed but only the other's coverage data exists.

[ultrathink] 🟢 DEFERRED: Full AC↔task↔test traceability parsing — trace checker currently verifies File List heading+content but not AC-to-test-file mapping. Full trace parser is adjudicator (M9) scope.
[ultrathink] 🟢 DEFERRED: Doctor preflight enhancement for npx-based tools — could try 'npx <tool> --version' instead of shutil.which. Separate improvement to collector_doctor.py.
